element.hint: Accounts existent before LTC project are all set as BAN per default. New Legal accounts received from MDM3.0 are set as CAN.
element.label: Account Category
element.name: u_account_category

element.hint: Billing accounts have UCM or MDM2 account number.
element.label: Account Number
element.name: u_account_number

element.hint: MDM3.0 accountNumber of Legal account (CAN) with values in format "QXH-7786427", value expected to be received from and sent to SFDC new integrations
element.label: Account Number MDM 3.0
element.name: u_account_number_mdm3_0

element.hint: Customer was migrated to MDM 3.0 LTC related
element.label: Customer migrated MDM3.0
element.name: u_customer_migrated_mdm3_0

element.hint: Legacy UCM ID value of Billing account info (UCM or MDM2 as source) before LTC
element.label: UCM or MDM ID 2.0 (Legacy)
element.name: u_ucmid_legacy

element.hint: Holds the UCM identifier for legacy accounts or MDM3 identifier for new Legal (CAN) accounts LTC migrated. Field used as reference in majority of external integrations
element.label: UCM ID - MDMID 3.0
element.name: u_ucm_id
